creator: trix@basement.net
text:
Looks like I've got a lead.  The permissions for /etc/resolv.conf changed after bootstrapping into CFEngine 3.7.2.  Still weird because my policy set makes no direct reference to resolv.conf.  I'll be opening a ticket with CFEngine upstream, if I can track down when it's happening.

In the meantime, the pack provided here seems to solve for this blunder.  Part of the reason I submitted it for consideration is because similar statements are used in /sbin/dhclient-script, and it seemed like a good idea at the time.
